WeaponTraitDef.label: heavy rounds
WeaponTraitDef.description: These specialized rounds are loaded with heavier projectiles. Their immense kinetic energy delivers a powerful impact, making them exceptionally effective at staggering targets and halting an enemy's advance, along with a slight increase in overall damage.

WeaponTraitDef.label: hollow point rounds
WeaponTraitDef.description: These are hollow point rounds. The bullets are designed to expand upon impact, causing more severe wounds and significantly increasing overall damage.

WeaponTraitDef.label: tox rounds
WeaponTraitDef.description: These rounds are tipped with a potent toxin. They are designed not just to injure, but to poison, inflicting a debilitating toxic buildup on anyone they hit.

WeaponTraitDef.label: piercing rounds
WeaponTraitDef.description: These rounds feature a dense, hardened core, engineered to punch through armor and damage the target underneath.

WeaponTraitDef.label: incendiary rounds
WeaponTraitDef.description: These rounds are loaded with an incendiary compound. Upon impact, they burst into flames, inflicting burns and potentially igniting targets and their surroundings.

WeaponTraitDef.label: EMP rounds
WeaponTraitDef.description: These rounds are embedded with micro-capacitors that release a small electromagnetic pulse on impact, capable of disrupting electronics and temporarily stunning mechanoids.

WeaponTraitDef.label: high power rounds
WeaponTraitDef.description: Packed with a potent propellant charge, these rounds deliver devastating impact and enhanced armor penetration. This raw power comes at a price, however, as the severe recoil makes the weapon more difficult to aim accurately.

WeaponTraitDef.label: pulse charge rounds
WeaponTraitDef.description: Each of these advanced rounds contains a highly unstable energy cell. Upon impact, it discharges a powerful energy pulse, delivering exceptional damage and allowing it to punch through hardened armor.

WeaponTraitDef.label: incendiary pellets
WeaponTraitDef.description: This round is packed with an incendiary substance that fragments upon impact, creating multiple hot particles that make ignition highly likely.

WeaponTraitDef.label: tox pellets
WeaponTraitDef.description: This round shatters upon impact, releasing a spray of toxic shards. This ensures the target is thoroughly contaminated, leading to a debilitating toxic buildup.

WeaponTraitDef.label: birdshot pellets
WeaponTraitDef.description: This round is engineered to shatter into a cone of fragments upon firing. This pattern is highly effective at close quarters, but the fragments lose energy quickly, making them unable to penetrate armor or maintain accuracy at a distance.

WeaponTraitDef.label: extended barrel
WeaponTraitDef.description: A carefully crafted extended barrel. It effectively increases the projectile's muzzle velocity, allowing it to travel further and thus significantly increasing the weapon's effective range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: shortened barrel
WeaponTraitDef.description: A deliberately shortened barrel. This sacrifices projectile velocity, leading to a significant reduction in effective range, but the lighter weight and improved balance allow the operator to aim down sights much faster.

WeaponTraitDef.label: tactical barrel
WeaponTraitDef.description: This barrel has been re-engineered with a focus on ergonomics and balance. Its structurally optimized profile reduces overall mass, making the weapon quicker to handle and easier to bring to a steady aim.

WeaponTraitDef.label: custom grip
WeaponTraitDef.description: This customized grip that handles recoil better, improving accuracy at short range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: quick magazine
WeaponTraitDef.description: Designed with an improved release mechanism, this magazine makes the reloading process quicker, helping to reduce downtime during a firefight.

WeaponTraitDef.label: extended magazine
WeaponTraitDef.description: This magazine holds more ammunition than the standard version, allowing the weapon to fire more shots in a single burst.

WeaponTraitDef.label: belt magazine
WeaponTraitDef.description: This belt-feeding mechanism provides a continuous stream of ammunition, enabling the weapon to unleash a significantly longer and more suppressive burst of fire.

WeaponTraitDef.label: drum magazine
WeaponTraitDef.description: This high-capacity drum magazine holds a substantial number of rounds, enabling the weapon to deliver a prolonged and overwhelming burst of fire.

WeaponTraitDef.label: rapid receiver
WeaponTraitDef.description: The internal mechanisms of this receiver have been finely tuned and its action lightened. This allows the weapon to cycle significantly faster, unleashing all shots in a burst as a blistering, rapid volley.

WeaponTraitDef.label: iron sight
WeaponTraitDef.description: A simple and reliable set of iron sights. They provide a basic but effective aiming point, ideal for rapid target acquisition in close-range engagements.

WeaponTraitDef.label: holoscope
WeaponTraitDef.description: This holographic sight projects a clear reticle into the user's field of view. It enables rapid, both-eyes-open aiming, which significantly reduces targeting time and increases precision from point-blank to medium ranges.

WeaponTraitDef.label: red dot scope
WeaponTraitDef.description: This electronic sight provides a single, illuminated red dot as the aiming point. By eliminating the need to align traditional front and rear sights, it dramatically simplifies the aiming process, improving accuracy across all effective ranges.

WeaponTraitDef.label: 2x scope
WeaponTraitDef.description: This optical scope offers 2x magnification, making the target appear larger and clearer. It provides a significant advantage for precise aiming in medium-range combat.

WeaponTraitDef.label: 2x scope
WeaponTraitDef.description: Offering 4x magnification, this optical scope is designed for effective engagement at medium to long distances. It allows the user to clearly identify and precisely aim at distant targets, slightly extending the weapon's maximum effective range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: 8x scope
WeaponTraitDef.description: A powerful 8x optical scope built for precision at long distances. Its high magnification brings distant targets into sharp focus, allowing for accurate shots at the outer limits of the weapon's effective range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: shortened stock
WeaponTraitDef.description: This stock has been cut down to reduce the weapon's overall mass. The result is a lighter, more compact weapon that is easier to carry and maneuver in tight spaces.

WeaponTraitDef.label: telescopic stock
WeaponTraitDef.description: Adjustable retractable stock for improved ergonomics. A better fit allows for a more stable shooting stance and greater precision.

WeaponTraitDef.label: fold stock
WeaponTraitDef.description: Featuring a robust locking mechanism, this folding stock provides an exceptionally stable shoulder rest when deployed. This solid foundation is crucial for maintaining a steady sight picture for accurate shots at medium to long ranges, while its design also slightly reduces the weapon's overall mass.

WeaponTraitDef.label: stabilizer brace
WeaponTraitDef.description: The stabilizing brace that connects to the user's arm, increasing its accuracy.

WeaponTraitDef.label: rapid trigger
WeaponTraitDef.description: This trigger assembly is designed with a shorter, crisper pull and a faster reset. This allows the firing mechanism to be actuated more quickly between shots, resulting in a more rapid and tightly-grouped burst.

WeaponTraitDef.label: vertical grip
WeaponTraitDef.description: This vertical foregrip provides an additional point of contact, giving the user greater control over the weapon. This enhanced stability is particularly effective for improving aiming precision during close-quarters combat.

WeaponTraitDef.label: triangular grip
WeaponTraitDef.description: The ergonomic design of this triangular foregrip allows for a more natural and comfortable hold. This improved handling makes it quicker to bring the weapon to a ready position and enhances stability for precise shots at point-blank range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: laser sight
WeaponTraitDef.description: This module projects a visible laser dot directly onto the target. This allows for rapid, intuitive point-and-shoot aiming, which significantly speeds up target acquisition and increases precision in close to medium-range engagements.

WeaponTraitDef.label: grenade launcher
WeaponTraitDef.description: This underbarrel attachment allows the weapon to fire a single high-explosive fragmentation grenade, providing a powerful area-of-effect option. It must be reloaded after each use.

WeaponTraitDef.label: EMP cannon
WeaponTraitDef.description: This underbarrel launcher fires specialized EMP shells. Upon impact, they release a powerful electromagnetic pulse capable of stunning mechanoids and disabling electronics. It can be fired twice before requiring a reload.

WeaponTraitDef.label: smoke launcher
WeaponTraitDef.description: This underbarrel launcher fires shells that release a dense cloud of smoke upon impact. It's perfect for obscuring sightlines and creating cover. It holds two shells and must be reloaded after they are used.

WeaponTraitDef.label: incendiary launcher
WeaponTraitDef.description: This underbarrel attachment fires a single incendiary shell. Upon impact, it bursts and splashes a wide area with burning chemfuel, creating a field of fire. It must be reloaded after each shot.

JobDef.description: Modifying a weapon with a part.
Modifying a weapon with a part.

RecipeDef.label: upgrade customize weapon
RecipeDef.description: Upgrade a standard weapon into a customizable frame.
